aspects.description: Source code quality
judgementScoreDescription: source code is not saved or contains only default files
code is readable and understandable, but insufficiently structured or optimized
repeated logic is extracted into separate methods/classes, and framework features are used correctly
code structure allows logic changes without rewriting large portions of code; best practices are applied

aspects.description: Registration form contains email, phone, and password. All fields are required. Client-side validation is implemented.
aspects.extraDescription: Deduct 0.25 for each missing field or incorrect validation

aspects.description: The user is automatically logged in after successful registration
The user can sign in with email or phone and password; a token is issued and stored on the client
The token is sent in the Authorization header with every request
The user can change email, phone, and password with validation (old/new/repeat)
aspects.extraDescription: Deduct 0.25 for each missing field or incorrect validation

aspects.description: The user can sign out; the token is removed
The user can create an advert with required fields (title, text, price, category, images). Default status is draft
aspects.extraDescription: Deduct 0.25 for each missing field or incorrect validation

aspects.description: The user can submit an advert for moderation (status = moderation)
The user can edit an advert only in draft status
The user can archive an advert from draft status
The user can delete an advert only in draft or archived status
The My Adverts page shows a list of the user's adverts
Adverts can be filtered by status
All published adverts are displayed with title, short description, price, category, and date
Filtering by category, price range, and keywords is implemented
Home page – Overall design
judgementScoreDescription: design does not fit the topic or looks poor
design fits the topic but looks simplistic
design fits the topic and looks good, but there is room for improvement
design fits the topic well and is excellent

aspects.description: The advert page displays title, description, price, category, images, date, and author
Images are displayed in a carousel (main image + thumbnails)
aspects.extraDescription: Main image centered; thumbnails displayed below the main image

aspects.description: Show phone button: number is initially hidden (first 4 digits visible); full number appears on click
A button for purchasing paid services is displayed next to the advert
A list of purchased services is displayed together with their expiration dates
Advert details page – Overall design
judgementScoreDescription: design does not fit the topic or looks poor
design fits the topic but looks simplistic
design fits the topic and looks good, but there is room for improvement
design fits the topic well and is excellent

aspects.description: Carousel functionality on the advert details page
judgementScoreDescription: does not meet carousel standards
meets standards but looks simplistic
meets standards well
excellent

aspects.description: An interface for purchasing the VIP service for 7 days is available when it is inactive
An interface for purchasing the TOP service for 3 days is available when it is inactive
Extension is only possible after the current period ends
Interface design and modularity
judgementScoreDescription: low quality
works but looks simplistic
good but can be improved
excellent modular design

aspects.description: Responsive design for different devices
Client-side routing is implemented for navigation
Error handling for invalid data, access denied, and server errors with user feedback (spinners, notifications)
Animations and user experience (UX) polish
judgementScoreDescription: no animations
very simplistic
good but can be improved
excellent and consistent with the design
